seoTitle: How to Change Font Size in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Adjust text size in Canva quickly to improve readability and keep your designs visually consistent across projects.
intro: Getting font size right affects both readability and how professional a design looks, and it's one of the most frequent adjustments you'll make in Canva. This guide covers selecting text and changing its size efficiently. It's useful for anyone building social graphics, marketing materials, or presentations who wants consistent, readable typography.

steps.heading: Select your text element
steps.body: Click on the text box you want to adjust within your Canva design.

steps.heading: Access font size settings
steps.body: Find the font size control in the top toolbar once your text is selected.

steps.heading: Adjust for consistency
steps.body: Set the size to match your design hierarchy, keeping headings and body text visually distinct.

steps.heading: Review the final layout
steps.body: Check the overall design to confirm the new sizing improves readability and balance.

faq.question: Can I change font size for multiple text boxes at once?
faq.answer: Selecting multiple text elements together typically lets you adjust their size in one action.

faq.question: Is there a recommended font size for social media graphics?
faq.answer: It varies by platform and design, but larger sizes generally improve readability on smaller screens.

faq.question: Will changing font size affect my text box dimensions?
faq.answer: Text boxes often resize automatically to fit the new font size, though you may need to manually adjust in some cases.
